name: The Last Visit
description: Before you go below, go back to the Field Hospital. Sevyas has been waiting.
accept_text: Adra finds you before you leave. 'He's been asking for you.' She says it simply, without elaborating. 'He knows you've found something. I don't know how he knows — I haven't told him. He just — knows.' She looks toward the ward. 'He asked me this morning if I thought you would come back.' She meets your eyes. 'I told him yes.'
complete_text: He's sitting up when you enter, hands folded, watching the door. He looks at you for a moment. 'You found the place.' Not a question. 'I dreamed it last night. Clean stone. People who have been somewhere very dark.' He's quiet. 'That's where I'm going, isn't it.' Also not a question. 'I don't mind. I want you to know I don't mind.' He shifts. 'Tell Thorn I said good. Not goodbye. Good.' He looks at you with eyes that are completely clear. 'I think I've been waiting to say that since the day I came back.'
